general.title: MOSuite - Plot Venn Diagram
general.instructions: Create Venn diagram or Intersection plot visualizations of differential expression results across multiple contrasts

parameters.name: multiOmicDataSet file pattern
parameters.description: Regex pattern used to locate the multiOmicDataSet .rds file

parameters.name: Feature ID column name
parameters.description: Column name for feature IDs (gene names, etc). If not provided, uses first column

parameters.name: Contrasts column name
parameters.description: Column name in data that contains the contrast names

parameters.name: Select contrasts
parameters.description: Comma-separated contrast names to select for the plot. If empty, all contrasts are used.

parameters.name: Plot type
parameters.description: Type of plot to generate: 'Venn diagram' or 'Intersection plot'

parameters.name: Intersection IDs
parameters.description: Comma-separated intersection IDs to select for the plot. If empty, all intersections are used.

parameters.name: Force unique elements
parameters.description: Force unique elements in the Venn diagram

parameters.name: Venn numbers format
parameters.description: Format for numbers in the Venn diagram: 'raw', 'percent', 'raw-percent', or 'percent-raw'

parameters.name: Venn significant digits
parameters.description: Number of significant digits for the Venn diagram numbers

parameters.name: Venn fill colors
parameters.description: Comma-separated fill colors for Venn diagram categories

parameters.name: Venn fill transparency
parameters.description: Transparency level for the Venn diagram fill colors (0-1)

parameters.name: Venn border colors
parameters.description: Border colors for Venn diagram categories. Set to 'fill colors' to use fill colors, or specify color names.

parameters.name: Category names font size
parameters.description: Font size for category names in the Venn diagram

parameters.name: Category names distance
parameters.description: Distance of category names from Venn circles (comma-separated numeric values)

parameters.name: Category names position
parameters.description: Position of category names (in degrees, comma-separated numeric values)

parameters.name: Counts font size
parameters.description: Font size for counts in the Venn diagram

parameters.name: Outer margin
parameters.description: Outer margin for the Venn diagram

parameters.name: Intersections order
parameters.description: Order of intersections in the plot: 'degree' or 'freq'

parameters.name: Display empty intersections
parameters.description: Display empty intersections in the plot

parameters.name: Intersection bar color
parameters.description: Color for the intersection bars in the plot

parameters.name: Intersection point size
parameters.description: Size of points in the intersection plot

parameters.name: Intersection line width
parameters.description: Width of lines in the intersection plot

parameters.name: Table font size
parameters.description: Font size for the table in the plot

parameters.name: Table content
parameters.description: Content of the table: 'all intersections' or 'selected intersections'

parameters.name: Image width
parameters.description: Output image width in pixels

parameters.name: Image height
parameters.description: Output image height in pixels

parameters.name: DPI
parameters.description: Dots per inch of output image

parameters.name: Plot filename
parameters.description: Plot output filename
